creator: cjk32@cam.ac.uk
text:
Rene Ladan wrote:
> 2010/4/21 Christopher Key <cjk32@cam.ac.uk>:
>   
>> Rene Ladan wrote:
>>     
>>> Here is a new diff for the Makefile which also works on FreeBSD/i386 < 8.
>>>
>>>
>>>       
>> Hello Rene,
>>
>> Attached is an updated diff that encporates the libusb fixes, and
>> additionally installs the missing documentation from a previous
>> distfile.  It builds on 6.4/7.4/8.0-amd64/i386 without problems.
>>
>>     
> (keeping current maintainer involved)
>
> The new patch looks great, but somehow downloading the previous distfiles
> for "just" the feels a bit overdone. The b36 distfile also has some
> documentation
> (like a manual page), maybe it is better to install that?
>
> Rene
>   

Apologies, brain addled by configuring tinderbox for i386 on amd64!

The attached patch should be a little more sane.
